Source URL: https://www.kff.org/state-category/health-status/disability/
Fetch Date: 2026-05-05
Data Year: 2023-2025 (varies by metric)
Coverage: All 50 states + DC
File Type: HTML tables
Row Count: 50+ rows with multiple metrics
Notes: KFF State Health Facts includes Medicaid enrollees by eligibility group and disability prevalence data.
